labs.clinicalContext: Limited data for severe CKD, no dosage adjustment required but monitoring recommended
Monitor for hypoglycemia when used with sulfonylureas or insulin

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Limited data for severe CKD. Injectable form: No dosage adjustment needed, limited data for severe CKD. Oral form: No dosage adjustment needed, limited data for severe CKD, not recommended with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m²
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: semaglutide (injection): 0.5 mg and 1 mg once weekly; No dosage adjustment; Limited data for severe CKD. Semaglutide (oral): 3 mg, 7 mg, or 14 mg daily; No dosage adjustment; Limited data for severe CKD
